blocks.content: He was standing in the middle of the cafeteria holding a tray. Across the room, Maya Reeves glanced up from a table near the windows and gave him a small nod — the kind that said she'd seen him before people started noticing him standing there.
People were starting to notice him standing there.

options.label: Walk to Jonathan's table. You know him.
Head toward Maya. She already knows your name.
Find somewhere quiet. Don't make it a test.
